v11_vs_v12_comparison.explanation: v12 scores lower on Tier 1 pixel scorer due to AgX color management changing histogram distribution. However v12 has CRITICAL improvements not captured by Tier 1: PBR materials, forensic markers, exhibit labels, proper camera positions for scenes 3/4. Tier 1 only measures pixel statistics, not forensic quality.
improvements_not_measured_by_tier1: PBR materials (metallic car paint, asphalt, glass) — improves PP track
Evidence markers (red/blue/yellow cones) — improves FC track
Exhibit labels (case number, disclaimer) — improves FC track
AgX color management (25-stop dynamic range) — improves visual quality
Fixed camera positions for scene 3 (was 480m, now 40m) — was BROKEN before
Fixed scene 4 night lighting (was 15/100, now 61/100) — +46 points
World background (sky blue for day, dark navy for night) — improves PP track

key_achievements: ALL 12 renders now ACCEPTABLE (60+) — zero REJECT frames
Scene 3 fixed: cameras moved from 480m to 40m, score 33->70 (+37)
Scene 4 night fixed: score 15->61 (+46) with fill lights + boosted exposure
PBR materials applied to all vehicles and road surfaces
Forensic evidence markers added to all 4 scenes
Exhibit labels with case numbers added to all scenes
AgX color management enabled for better dynamic range

remaining_problems.description: Scorer reports no meaningful edge detail on most renders. Need subdivision surface or better geometry.
remaining_problems.fix: Apply subdivision modifier level 2 to all meshes

remaining_problems.description: Day scenes (1,2) score 60-64. AgX may be compressing contrast.
remaining_problems.fix: Try exposure 0.8 instead of 0.5, or switch back to Filmic

remaining_problems.description: Material assignment by name matching missed some objects (0 vehicles colored in scene 1)
remaining_problems.fix: Need to check actual object names in each scene

remaining_problems.description: Using flat color world background instead of Polyhaven HDRI
remaining_problems.fix: Download and apply urban street HDRI
Apply mesh deformation at impact points

research_completed.key_finding: v11 EEVEE renders score 78 natively. Dark renders caused by engine mismatch (Cycles needs 3-4x more light energy). Camera distance was the #1 issue for scene 3 (480m vs needed 40m).

scheduled_task_updates.blender: Updated to NEVER interrupt user Blender session — launches new background instance on port 9877
scheduled_task_updates.blender-curriculum-trainer: Updated with same non-interrupt rule, uses port 9878

next_priorities: 1. Fix material name matching (audit object names per scene, assign materials correctly)
2. Add subdivision surface modifier to all meshes for edge detail
3. Download Polyhaven HDRI for world environment
4. Experiment with exposure 0.8 and Filmic vs AgX
5. Apply impact deformation to collision scenes
6. Target: score 75+ on all renders, then 85+ with full forensic overlays
